Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
Freedom Mortgage Pavilion
Camden, NJ
Previous Names:
Blockbuster–Sony Music Entertainment Center at the Waterfront (Changed after 2000)
Tweeter Center at the Waterfront (Changed after 2007)
Susquehanna Bank Center (Changed after 2015)
BB&T Pavilion (Changed after 2021)
Waterfront Music Pavilion (Changed after 2022)
Seating Capacity: 25000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 49
  DMB  (48)
  Dave solo  (1)

Longest Performance:
07.21.04 - Seek Up (21:17)

Song Liberations
  8.7.07 – Sweet Up and Down (after 2569 days)
  6.13.14 – Good Good Time (after 1414 days)
  6.26.15 – Down by the River (after 2952 days)
  6.26.15 – Smooth Rider (after 2169 days)
  6.24.16 – Fool to Think (after 1081 days)
  6.15.19 – Sugar Will (after 1050 days)
  6.15.19 – Maker, The (after 1014 days)
  7.15.22 – Fool to Think (after 1112 days)
  7.21.23 – Hunger for the Great Light (after 1820 days)
  7.21.23 – Help Myself (after 1594 days)
Venue Picture
Description
This venue opened in June 1995. It converts to a 7,000-seat indoor theatre in the wintertime.

1 Harbour Blvd.
Camden, NJ 08103

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Rain Intro (6.5.96)
Prelude to Grace (6.23.01)
Captain (full and updated) (7.16.02)
Kit Kat Jam (7.16.02)
Hey Hey, My My (Into the Black) (full band) (6.3.08)
Bitch (6.4.08)
The Riff (6.27.12)
